Package io.bloviate.gen.tpcc

package io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.bloviate.gen
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CreditGenerator
    Generates the TPC-C customer credit rating (clause 4.3.2.7): "GC" (good credit) 90% of the time and "BC" (bad credit) 10% of the time.
    CreditGenerator.Builder
    Builds CreditGenerator instances.
    CustomerLastNameGenerator
    Generates TPC-C customer last names (clause 4.3.2.3): three concatenated syllables selected from a fixed set by a number in [0, 999].
    CustomerLastNameGenerator.Builder
    Builds CustomerLastNameGenerator instances.
    DataColumnGenerator
    Generates the TPC-C i_data / s_data values (clause 4.3.3.1): a random alphabetic string of length 26..50 that, 10% of the time, contains the literal "ORIGINAL" at a random position.
    DataColumnGenerator.Builder
    Builds DataColumnGenerator instances.
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator
    Generates ol_delivery_d for the order_line table under variable order-line cardinality: a delivery timestamp for the lines of delivered orders, and NULL for the lines of the most recent (undelivered) orders.
    OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    Builds OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator instances.
    TPCCConfiguration
    Builds a complete set of TableConfigurations for the TPC-C schema (see create_tpcc.*.sql), suitable for passing to a DatabaseConfiguration.
    TPCCUtils
    Utilities implementing pieces of the TPC-C specification.
    ZipCodeGenerator
    Generates TPC-C zip codes (clause 4.3.2.7): four random digits followed by the constant suffix "11111", producing a 9-character value.
    ZipCodeGenerator.Builder
    Builds ZipCodeGenerator instances.

Bloviate API Reference · bloviate.io
